title: memecylon subfurfuraceum
intro: Memecylon subfurfuraceum, also known as the Wild Memecylon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical forests in Sri Lanka, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Memecylon subfurfuraceum can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
